CTN 4, 034 [Šumma Izbu 01][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
oo NaN  (start of obverse missing)
o 1'o 1'

BE ⸢MUNUS a-pi₂⸣-[sa₂]-⸢la-a U₃⸣.TU [...]

If a woman gives birth to a apisalû-cripple [...].

o 2'2'

BE ⸢MUNUS⸣ UZU.NU U₃.TU [...]

If a woman gives birth to a lipištu-substance [...].

o 3'3'

BE MUNUS 2 u₂-lu 3 lip!-ša₂!-tu₂ U₃.TU ⸢E₂?⸣ [...]

If a woman gives birth to 2 or 3 lipištu-substance: the house [...].

o 4'4'

BE MUNUS ⸢SIG₄⸣ U₃.TU IRI [...]

If a woman gives birth to a mudbrick: the city [...].

o 5'5'

⸢BE MUNUS⸣ UŠ₃še-li-tu₂ U₃.TU DU [...]

If a woman gives birth to an afterbirth: ... [...].

o 6'6'

[BE] MUNUS SAG.⸢DU⸣ U₃.TU [...]

If a woman gives birth to a head [...].

o 7'7'

BE MUNUS qa-ti! U₃.TU [...]

If a woman gives birth to a hand [...].

o 8'8'

[BE] MUNUS ri-it!-tu₂ U₃.TU [...]

If a woman gives birth to a wrist [...].

o 9'9'

[...] U₃.TU [...]

[...] gives birth to [...].

o 10'10'

[...] x x ⸢U₃.TU⸣ [...]

[...] ... gives birth to [...].
